message:
fix(mcp-share/deploy): wrap quick_check + schema-validation probes in DbConnGuard

Two more short-lived DB connections in the share-deploy path that were
dropping without an explicit close, emitting the `drop_close` warn on
every share deploy:

- `run_sqlite_quick_check(db_path)` runs `PRAGMA quick_check` and
  drops.
- `validate_agent_mail_schema(db_path)` runs a couple of
  introspection queries and drops.

Wrap both connections via `guard_db_conn(conn, "share::deploy::<fn>")`
right after open so the `DbConnGuard::Drop` impl routes through
`close_sync()`.

Matches the pattern applied across the rest of the mcp_agent_mail
server/tools/resources surfaces over the last few commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
